title: LocatorBarControl
description: Add a command to your server that allows players to share their location or hide it from the locator bar.
body:
# For Players

To hide your location, use:

- `/trigger location_toggler`

You will see a message saying that your location in the locator bar has been disabled.  
This means you are now invisible.  
**(This is how other players see you)**

![Location Disabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/740db6f4e92db7d52a7c7fefd449bc6025950ff4.png)

---

To unhide your location, use the same command again:

- `/trigger location_toggler`

You will see a message saying that your location in the locator bar has been enabled.  
This means you are now visible.  
**(This is how other players see you)**

![Location Enabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48b27ee26c31202c1c0b1738e5e2c09cf749979e.png)
